work_request: Prepare post-hearing disposition, financial assessment, and installment-plan fields for the three listed citations.

environment_records_to_consult.citations: Use live citation records for citation identity, violation details, and any existing approved plan dates or amounts.
environment_records_to_consult.fee_schedule: Use Lane traffic fee rows active on the disposition or order date.
environment_records_to_consult.payment_policy: Use Lane installment policy for minimum plan amounts and default first-due-date handling.
environment_records_to_consult.stale_exports: The old financial ledger snapshot may contain similar citation numbers or older import status; use it only as a conflict warning.

bench_packet_rows.plan_note: Extended plan approved at the amount and first due date already recorded on the live citation.
bench_packet_rows.clerk_warning: There is a nearby stale citation import for CIT-LAN-2024-00412 under Evan Tuner. Do not merge it into this citation.

bench_packet_rows.plan_note: Defendant requested a low monthly amount; judge approved the lowest amount allowed by local policy. No first payment date was announced on the record.
bench_packet_rows.clerk_warning: The live citation may still show pending because this bench row is the current post-hearing result.

bench_packet_rows.plan_note: Extended plan approved at the amount and first due date already recorded on the live citation.
bench_packet_rows.clerk_warning: A trainee worksheet included optional fees, but only charges supported by the order and active schedule should be entered.

output_notes.entry_order: Return citation entries ordered by citation_number ascending.
output_notes.excluded_candidate_fee_codes: For each citation, include candidate fee or charge codes from the import workpaper that are not entered in the final financial assessment.
